validation_velocity.validation_model: Landing page + pre-sale + 10 customer interviews + 1 paid cohort test
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 5 qualified leads reach checkout or paid deposit intent and at least 2 commit within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: Paid traffic and outreach fail to produce at least 2 qualified checkout or deposit signals in the test window.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 4; citation status ready; regulatory route present

demand_pull.derivation_basis: Screenshots confirm strong adjacent OET demand and exam-intent queries, but not a clear doctor-specific owned channel. Added latest SEMrush scorecard sync.

market_evidence.notes: Current SEMrush evidence matches the expected scope for this product (reference). Evidence database: US. Captured 3/3 anchor families with total local query volume 520 and max anchor volume 260. Lane rollup contains 20 deduplicated keywords, including 5 P1 terms. Current watchlist domains: oet.com, cambridgeenglish.org, e2language.com, google.com, reddit.com. Top follow-up keywords: oet test results (P1, vol 210), oet result login (P2, vol 70), how long do oet test results take (P2, vol 20), oet test practice (P1, vol 260), oet practice tests (P2, vol 30). Next step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks.
